alt: Sun-streaked creative studio workspace with design tools, sketches, and reference materials spread across a wooden worktable.
Over-the-shoulder view of designers working at their desks in a warm, naturally lit studio.
Branding identity system spread on a worktable with stationery mockups, colour cards, and printed collateral.
Minimalist packaging design in soft earth tones photographed on a neutral textured surface.
Open editorial magazine spread showing considered typography and generous white space on a wooden desk.
Digital interface mockup displayed on a screen with clean layouts and a muted colour palette.
Close-up of hands sketching layout ideas on paper with markers and pencils scattered nearby.
Wide view of a team collaboration session with whiteboard sketches, sticky notes, and printed work pinned to the wall.
Warm, considered portrait of a studio founder in soft natural light against a muted interior backdrop.
Moody studio interior detail with a leafy plant, framed prints, and a neat stack of design books.
Close-up of an open art and design book showing tactile printed pages and considered typography.
Soft morning light streaming through a tall studio window with a city view in the distance.
